findings.title: MASTER_PLAN active line and historical step-closeout line diverge
findings.detail: The active PLAN_STATUS still points to execution-core repair / reserve-first stage-20 re-entry, while the later step-16 historical closeout names release-gate alignment as the next contour.

findings.title: Historical release-gate and pilot artifacts remain blocked
findings.detail: Historical pilot-entry artifacts still record blocked conditions, including the missing 14-day metrics window.

findings.title: External-models UI closeouts cannot be promoted into pilot proof
findings.detail: Those contours explicitly keep installer, packaging, and release work out of scope and therefore cannot close the historical pilot gate.

findings.title: Stale external-models C5 closeout wording is real but non-blocking
findings.detail: The pending commit/push wording should not be used as current truth, but it does not by itself block this alignment diagnosis.

earned_claims: execution-core design gate earned through non-repo-owned NO_GO path
repo-local UI owner surfaces tested green
recommended_next_action: Open a narrower master-plan active-path reconciliation or live-path-selection contour before any pilot-entry alignment claim is reopened.
